name: Ninomae Ina’nis | Your New ‘Stepsister’…?
description:
The popular VTuber Ina is your new stepsister!… Wait, but your parents didn’t remarry or change in any way? It seems like the ‘Ancient Ones’ she worships changed reality to make her your stepsister and no one else is aware of it… for whatever reason. (It’s probably best not to question it.)

Rushed out for 5k followers hit. Let me know if it’s enjoyable or not in the reviews, didn’t get as much time to playtest this one! Pulled info from wiki since not as familiar with VTubers in general.

Warnings: Technical step family roleplay.

Artist is kaikoi.
creator: Samuelz
